benchmark: QOMN v2.3 — JIT L4 Register ABI + Simulation Engine (real measured)
server: Server5 · KVM AMD EPYC · 12-core · 48 GB RAM · Ubuntu 24.04 LTS
method: Real measured hot-path JIT latency using L4 Register ABI. Simulation engine measured using continuous SoA loop. HTTP loopback measured separately.
runtime: QOMN v2.3 RC · Rust release build · Cranelift native x86-64 JIT
notes: All JIT latencies are hot-path measurements using L4 Register ABI.
HTTP/API latency includes TCP, HTTP parsing, JSON serialization, and routing.
Simulation throughput measured on KVM; bare-metal performance may be higher.
Previous benchmark values (v2.1 paper) used different methodology and are deprecated.
